data.body: PASS-1 G6 (approach soundness) coaching — see structured findings; posted here for the author's audit trail. Grounded the kill-switch/fail-open premise in shipped code: `require_plan_review_for_claim` already exists (src/rebar/config.py:260, rebar.toml:21) and defaults OFF with claim unchanged; transition.py:651-662 fails the gate OFF on unreadable config (fail-open); preserve-and-ignore forward-compat for new event types already ships (SCHEMA_VERSION bump, docs/remediation-implementation-plan.md:719; REVIEW_RESULT is reducer-ignored + fsck-recognized). Net: the live-config kill-switch portion of this plan re-proposes an existing mechanism; the genuinely-novel gap is artifact rollback to an OLD reducer.
